title: mesosphaerum heterophyllum
intro: Mesosphaerum heterophyllum, also known as Brazilian pepperwort or Brazilian tea tree, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oils. The health benefits of Mesosphaerum heterophyllum include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Herbal preparations of Mesosphaerum heterophyllum include teas, infusions, and essential oils that can be used topically or inhaled to harness its medicinal properties.
